Bank Accounts

          
Used for bank reconciliation. Only the last 4 digits of account numbers are stored. Accounts save immediately — no need to click "Save Company Info".

          

          

            
Add Account

Owner Identity

          

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

          

        


        
        

          
Household Income & Withholding

          
Used to calculate estimated tax obligations alongside business income. Business income is pulled from live data — enter other household sources here.

          

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

          

        


        
        

          
Prior Year Tax Data

          
Used for safe harbor calculations and bracket estimates. The dashboard checks live data first — these values are the fallback when current-year data is incomplete.

          

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

          

        


        
        

          
Tax Rate Assumptions

          
Used for estimated tax projections. Adjust if your effective rate differs from the assumed marginal rate.

          

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

          

        


        
        

          
✓ Saved

          
        


      


      
      
      


        
        

          
Accounting Method

          

            

              
              
              
Accrual is recommended for businesses that invoice clients or carry receivables.

            

            

              
              
              
Determines equity account structure (Owner's Capital vs. Shareholder Equity).

            

          

        


        
        

          
Fiscal Year

          

            

              
              
              
Most small businesses use a calendar year (January). Fiscal years are less common but fully supported.

            

            

              
              
              
Used to scope P&L reports and year-end closing entries.

            

          

        


        
        

          
Chart of Accounts Template

          

            

              Select a starter template to pre-populate your Chart of Accounts. You can add, edit, or delete any account at any time from the Chart of Accounts tab. Selecting a template here only takes effect if your COA is currently empty.
            

            

              
              
              
              
            

            
No template selected.

          

        


        

          
          
✓ Saved

        


        
        

          
Expense Category → Account Mapping
            Links each expense category to a COA account for journal entry generation
          

          

            Map each expense category to its debit account. When journal entries are auto-generated, the matched account is debited and your bank or payable account is credited. Requires a Chart of Accounts to be populated first.
          


          

            ⚠ Your Chart of Accounts is empty. Go to Settings → Chart of Accounts to add accounts before configuring mappings.
          


          

            

              
                

                  Expense Category
                  Debit Account (COA)
                  
                

              
              
            

          


          

            
            
            
            
✓ Saved

          

        


        
        

          
Revenue Category → Account Mapping
            Links each revenue type to a COA account
          

          

            Map each revenue type to its credit account. When an invoice is posted, that account is credited and Accounts Receivable (or Bank, for cash-basis) is debited.
          


          

            

              
                

                  Revenue Category
                  Credit Account (COA)
                  
                

              
              
            

          


          

            
            
            
            
✓ Saved

Notification Center

Google Apps Script Write-Back

          

            Enables the dashboard to write data back to your Google Sheet — bank reconciliations,
            config updates, and account changes. Set this up once per browser; it persists across
            dashboard versions. See the Setup Guide in the roadmap for deployment steps.
          

          

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

          

          

            
            
            
          

          
          

            
⚠ Recovery Tools

            

              Full-replace sync rewrites the entire sheet tab from local data. Use only to recover after data loss or a bad import. Normal entry saves append to the sheet automatically.
            

            
Full-replace sync (use only after data loss):

            

              
              
            

            
Clear local cache (removes duplicate entries — sheet data is preserved):

            

              
              
            

          

          

        


        

          
Write-Back Operations

          

            Once connected, the following operations automatically write to your sheet:
          

          

            
              

                Action
                Sheet Tab
                Trigger
              

            
            
              

                Bank Reconciliation
                00_BankRec
                On submit · auto-sync
              

              

                Settings (Config)
                00_Config
                On Save All Settings
              

              

                Bank Accounts
                00_Accounts
                On add / edit
              

              

                Expense Logging
                06_Expense_Log
                Planned — v6.0
              

              

                Invoice Creation
                05_Invoices
                Planned — v6.0
              

              

                Mileage Log
                00_Mileage
                On trip add · sync available
              

            
          

        

      


      

    

  


  
  

    

      

        
1099-NEC Tracker

        
Vendor payment review · $600+ threshold · non-card methods

      

        

          
1099-NEC Tracker

          

            Automatically scans your Expense Log for vendors paid $600+ via non-card methods.
            You can mark vendors as Confirmed 1099, Excluded (corp, card, etc.), or leave them for review.
            Overrides persist in localStorage.
          


          
          

            Show:
            
            
            
            
            
          


          

            
Loading…

          


          

            Excluded payment methods (card-processed, no 1099 needed):
            Business card · Personal card · Credit card · Debit card · ACH (card network)
            

            Included methods (may require 1099):
            Owner paid · Cash · Check · ACH (bank) · Wire · Venmo · Zelle · PayPal (business) · Other

Journal Entries

        
Auto-generated from expenses & invoices · COA-mapped

      


        
        

          

            
Auto-Generated Journal Entries

            
Generated from your Expense Log and Invoice data using your COA mappings.

          

          

          
          
        


        
        

          
Source:

          
          
          
          

          
—

        


        
        

          ⚠ Some categories have no COA mapping. Those entries will be marked Unmapped. Go to the Accounting Config tab to add mappings.
        


        
        


        
        

          

            
              

                JE #
                Date
                Description
                Source
                Debit Account
                Credit Account
                Amount
                Status
              

            
            
              
Click Regenerate to generate journal entries from your data.

            
          

        


        
        

          ● Expense: Debit expense account → Credit AP/Bank
          ● Invoice (sent): Debit AR → Credit revenue account
          ● Invoice (paid): Debit Bank → Credit AR

1099-NEC Tracking

      

        Vendors paid $600 or more during the year via non-card methods may require a 1099-NEC.
        Credit card payments are excluded — the card issuer handles those. Review and confirm before filing.

                Handoff
                
              

              

                
Updated Mar 7, 2026

                
⚑ Read First

              

            

            
New Claude Instance — Onboarding Guide

            
Everything a new Claude thread needs to get up to speed immediately

            

              

                
WHAT THIS PROJECT IS

                
Arquentix Financial Operating System — a single-file HTML dashboard (no build step, no server) that reads a Google Sheet via the Sheets API and writes back via a Google Apps Script (GAS) Web App endpoint. It is a complete small business financial OS: contracts, invoices, time tracking, expenses, mileage, bank rec, P&L, ledger, tax position. Owner: Jim. All data is real — treat it carefully.

              

              

                
FILES TO READ BEFORE ANYTHING ELSE

                

                  
1. Transcript journal: /mnt/transcripts/journal.txt — lists all past session transcripts with descriptions

                  
2. Latest session transcript: /mnt/transcripts/2026-03-07-19-21-08-arquentix-fos-v524-bugfix.txt — full session history with all decisions, bugs, and context

                  
3. Working dashboard file: /home/claude/arquentix-dashboard-v5_13.html — filename frozen at v5_13, content is always current version. Verify with: grep "const VERSION" file

                  
4. GAS endpoint: /mnt/user-data/outputs/arquentix-gas-endpoint.gs — deployed, token is 'Rocket', actions: ping / writeBankRec / upsertConfig / upsertAccount / appendMileage

                  
5. Sheet: ID 1--PlKXReQQUERsz68NNgvEj9F59ZfCVC79FmMQtc4XQ

                

              

              

                
CRITICAL GOTCHAS — NEVER VIOLATE THESE

                

                  
• Working file FILENAME is frozen at v5_13 — always verify actual version by grep, never assume from filename

                  
• Div balance must stay at 1447 opens / 1447 closes — always check before shipping

                  
• GAS fetch uses Content-Type: text/plain — do NOT change or CORS preflight will break it

                  
• CN_DEFAULT is a template literal — NO backticks ever inside it

                  
• bgImage in defaultSettings is ~400KB base64 webp — never touch it

                  
• JE cache (arq_journal_entries_v1) is regenerated from sheet — NEVER write back

                  
• ROLE_TABS must include ALL tab IDs — applyRolePermissions() hides any tab not listed

                  
• Use Python via bash_tool for complex str_replace — exact match required

                  
• Never act on assumptions — state what you are about to do and wait for confirmation

                  
• Double-QA every fix: Pass 1 = verify the change, Pass 2 = regression check

                

              

              

                
WHERE WE LEFT OFF (Mar 9, 2026 — v5.36)

                

                  
• Current VERSION = v5.35. Source: /mnt/project/arquentix-dashboard-v5_24__3_.html (copy to /home/claude/arquentix-dashboard-v5_13.html before editing)

                  
• Mileage sync fully finalized. Add → appendMileage (single row append). Delete → deleteMileageRow (finds by Trip_ID, deletes that row). Both fire-and-forget on milAdd/milDelete.

                  
• ⬆ Sync to Sheet = full replace recovery only. ⬇ Load from Sheet = restore on fresh device.

                  
• GAS actions active: appendMileage, deleteMileageRow, syncMileage, getMileage. Endpoint requires redeploy to activate deleteMileageRow.

                

              

              

                
PRIORITY QUEUE — WHAT TO WORK ON NEXT

                

                  
✅ GAS endpoint fully redeployed (v5.30). All mileage actions live: appendMileage, deleteMileageRow, syncMileage, getMileage.

                  
✅ All bugs resolved — see roadmap for planned features

Settings & QA Hardening

            
Settings overhaul, security hardening, bank accounts registry, and data seeding

            

              

                
✓
1. Settings form no longer resets on data syncpopulateSettingsForm removed from renderAll — unsaved edits preserved during background refresh

                
✓
2. Default Tab dropdown expandedCapital, Tax, and About now available as startup tab options

                
✓
3. Inline user management confirmationsRemove user and self-role-change now use styled inline confirm/cancel rows instead of native browser dialogs

                
✓
4. Dead code removed — closeSettings(), redundant openSettings() call

                
✓
5. applyRoleUI crash fixedchangeRole() now correctly calls applyRolePermissions() — was throwing ReferenceError on every self-role-change

                
✓
6. Critical KPI rendering fixes (v5.4)Cash Runway and Unbilled Hours KPI cards added to DOM; Cash Runway math corrected; DOCTYPE declaration moved to document top

                
✓
7. High severity fixes batch 1 (v5.5)fmt$() fixed — negative values display correctly; error banner fixed; Partially Paid misclassification fixed; session role re-verified on load; Tax tab demo data added; ~30KB static watermark HTML removed; Save button label corrected

                
✓
8. Security hardening batch 1 (v5.7)Passwords hashed with SHA-256 (pure-JS, works on file://); PBKDF2 replaced; API key XOR-obfuscated and stored separately; esc() hardened; onclick/onchange attributes replaced with delegated listeners

                
✓
9. Feature + UI batch (v5.8)Qualifying pipeline stage; dynamic Tax KPI subtitle; password change modal; topbar username/role; VERSION constant; P&L chart height increased; notification mailto improvements; Contracts filter expanded; Time Log KPI corrected; sort robustness fixes; invoice table cleanup

                
✓
10. Settings restructured into 4 sub-tabs (v5.10)Company | Personal | System | Notifications; Address Line 2 and Date Established fields; full Personal sub-tab with filing status, prior AGI, dependents, HSA; Bank Accounts registry with full CRUD UI

                
✓
11. Google Sheet upgraded to v2 (Mar 6, 2026)00_Config tab (49 company config rows); 00_Accounts bank registry; 00_BankRec reconciliation log; 5 stub tabs; Account_ID columns appended to Expense Log, Invoices, Contrib/Draws; all original data preserved

                
✓
12. Company data & bank accounts pre-seeded (v5.11)defaultSettings pre-populated with all Arquentix company info; all 4 Mercury accounts auto-seed on first open; missing fields added to defaultSettings

Journal Entry auto-generation system (Mar 6, 2026)arq_journal_entries_v1 data structure; auto-gen from expenses and invoices using category→COA mappings; JE rules: expense Dr [Expense Acct] / Cr AP; invoice Dr AR / Cr [Revenue Acct]; payment Dr Bank / Cr AR; Settings → Journal Entries tab with regenerate, CSV export, filtering; stats display; unmapped category warnings with red highlighting

Bank Reconciliation dashboard tab (Mar 6, 2026)Full tab with history table, single entry form, auto-diff calculation, AI PDF extraction via Anthropic API, GAS write-back to 00_BankRec sheet tab, localStorage persistence, status (Reconciled / Reconciled with Variance / Pending), notes

4b. Bucket overrun badge — Contracts & Overview (Mar 9, 2026)Overview burn panel and Contracts table both detect used > bucket. Fills bar fully red, flips label to "X hrs OVER" in danger color, shows red OVER badge. No longer clamps at 100% — overrun state is visually distinct from at-limit.

                
✓
5. Home office deduction support (Mar 9, 2026)Reads Tax_Year, Method, Home_Sqft, Office_Sqft, and expense fields from 00_HomeOffice sheet. Calculates IRS simplified ($5 × min(sqft, 300), max $1,500) or actual expense (business% × total home expenses). Tax tab panel shows sq ft KPI cards, business%, method note, and IRS eligibility reminder.

Nav cleanup — Phase 2 complete (Mar 9, 2026)Settings tab moved from primary nav to topbar ⚙ icon button. "Accounting" sub-tab renamed to "Accounting Config" to prevent future naming collision. switchTab and applyRolePermissions updated for topbar icon pattern.

                
7

Mar 9, 2026

                
✓ Complete

              

            

            
Sheet-Backed Config Persistence

            
Google Sheet as source of truth · localStorage as read-through cache

            

              

                
✓
1. Dedicated 00_Config tab in Google SheetKey-value row schema stores company identity, notification rules, display preferences, and app config — seeded with all Arquentix company data (Mar 6, 2026)

                
✓
2. localStorage as read-through cache (Mar 6, 2026)Confirmed implemented: app loads from localStorage on startup, auto-refresh fetches sheet in background and updates UI. No cold-start delay.

                
✓
3. Bidirectional config read/write (Mar 9, 2026)saveAllSettings() now writes all settings to 00_Config: company_name, currency, date_format, default_tab, notif_email, notification_settings (all 16 notif fields), display_settings (refresh interval, bg opacity/blur, tagline, logo). loadMappingsFromSheet() reads all keys back on fresh device.

                
✓
4. API key stays local only (Mar 6, 2026)API key and Sheet ID stored in localStorage only, never written to sheet or GAS payload. Excluded from all sync ops by design. Confirmed in code audit.

                
✓
5. Large assets remain local (Mar 6, 2026)Logo/background images in localStorage only (base64, 400KB+). All text config fields sync via upsertConfig. Architecture confirmed correct.

              

              
Completed Mar 9, 2026

            

          

        


        
        

          

          

            

              

                Complete
                
              

              

                
Mar 9, 2026

                
✓ Complete

              

            

            
Master Sync — localStorage → Google Sheet

            
One button to push all offline-first data to the sheet · individual sync buttons replaced by master sync in Settings → Integrations

            

              

                
✓
1. milSyncAll() — Mileage write-back (Mar 7, 2026)Loops all arq_mileage_v1 trips and fires gasWriteMileage() for each with 300ms rate-limit delay. ⬆ Sync to Sheet button on Mileage tab. Called by master syncAllToSheet(). Individual sync buttons to be removed when master sync is complete.

                
✓
2. syncAllToSheet() master function stub (Mar 7, 2026)Master function that calls all individual sync functions in sequence. Currently wires milSyncAll(). Future modules added here as implemented.

                
✓
3. Sync confirmation dialog design — local/remote count (Mar 7, 2026)Before any sync fires, show dialog: "Syncing X changes to a sheet with Y records. Proceed? Yes/No". Rules: X=0 → block with "Nothing to sync"; X=Y → ⚠ full overwrite warning (unusual); Y=0 → fresh sheet notice. Sheet record count stored via COUNTA formula cell in 00_Config, read on dashboard load — always current regardless of direct sheet edits.

                
✓
4. Sync confirmation modal on milSyncAll() (Mar 7, 2026)Full-replace sync: dashboard sends all local trips to new GAS syncMileage action which clears 00_Mileage rows and rewrites in one batch. Confirmation modal shows trip count + overwrite warning before firing. Auto-fire on milAdd() removed — sync is now explicit. Last-synced timestamp shown in table footer. GAS endpoint requires redeploy to activate syncMileage.

                
✓
5. Load from Sheet — mileage restore on fresh device (Mar 9, 2026)New GAS getMileage action reads all 00_Mileage rows and returns them as JSON. Dashboard ⬇ Load from Sheet button calls getMileage, maps rows to local trip format, saves to arq_mileage_v1, re-renders table. Warns before overwriting existing local trips. Completes the bidirectional sync loop: Load (sheet→local) + Sync (local→sheet).

                
✓
6. Mileage sync fully finalized — real-time append + delete (Mar 9, 2026)Add trip → gasWriteMileage() appends single row to 00_Mileage immediately. Delete trip → deleteMileageRow() finds row by Trip_ID and removes it immediately. ⬆ Sync to Sheet (full replace, recovery only) + ⬇ Load from Sheet (restore on fresh device) remain as manual recovery tools. GAS actions: appendMileage, deleteMileageRow, syncMileage, getMileage.

                
✓
5. recSyncAll() — Bank Rec write-back (Mar 9, 2026)brSyncAll() full-replace sync via new GAS syncBankRecs action. brLoadFromSheet() restores localStorage from 00_BankRec via new getBankRecs action. ⬆ Sync to Sheet + ⬇ Load from Sheet buttons in Reconciliation History header. Confirmation modal before overwrite. Normal saves still write individual recs immediately via writeBankRec.

                
✓
6. receiptSyncAll() — Receipt attachment sync (superseded Mar 9, 2026)Receipt attachments write to 00_Config via upsertConfig(receipt_attachments) on every change, and restore on fresh device via loadMappingsFromSheet(). Dedicated sync function not needed — already continuous.

                
✓
7. t99SyncAll() — 1099 overrides sync (superseded Mar 9, 2026)1099 overrides write to 00_Config via upsertConfig(tax_1099_overrides) on every confirm/exclude click, and restore via loadMappingsFromSheet(). Dedicated sync function not needed — already continuous.

                
✓
8. coaSyncAll() — COA write-back (superseded Mar 9, 2026)COA writes to 00_Config via upsertConfig(coa_accounts) on every save, and restores via loadMappingsFromSheet(). Dedicated sync function not needed — already continuous.

                
✓
9. syncAllToSheet() master function (Mar 9, 2026)syncAllToSheet() now calls milSyncAll() + brSyncAll() in sequence. receiptSyncAll/t99SyncAll/coaSyncAll superseded by Sheet-Backed Config continuous writes. Master button wiring to Settings → Integrations deferred — individual sync buttons on each tab serve the purpose.

                
✓
11. Expenses local entry + sheet sync (Mar 10, 2026)Expenses tab now mirrors Time Log / Mileage tab functionality. Add form: Date, Amount, Category (from STANDARD_EXPENSE_CATEGORIES), Deductible Y/N, Vendor, Description, Payment Method, Business Purpose, Account (from bank accounts). totalDeductible computed client-side (amount when Y, 0 when N). By Category + By Vendor panels auto-update on add/delete. Year filter + Deductible/Non-Deductible/All filter. CSV export. Fire-and-forget gasWriteExpense() on add. ⬆ Sync to Sheet (full-replace recovery) + ⬇ Load from Sheet. syncAllToSheet() updated. GAS actions: appendExpense, deleteExpense, syncExpenses, getExpenses. Sheet: 00_Expense_Log (separate from 06_Expense_Log sheet data source).

                
✓
10. Time Log local entry + sheet sync (Mar 10, 2026)Time Log tab now mirrors Mileage tab functionality. Add form: Date, Hours, Client, Project/Workstream, Task/Description, Billable Y/N, Rate/hr. Add entry → gasWriteTimeEntry() appends to 00_Time_Log immediately. Delete → deleteTimeEntry() removes by Entry_ID. ⬆ Sync to Sheet (full-replace recovery) + ⬇ Load from Sheet (fresh device restore). KPIs: Total Hours YTD, Total Earned, Billable Hours, Avg Rate — all from localStorage. Year filter + Billable/Non-Billable/All filter. CSV export. syncAllToSheet() updated to include tlSyncAll(). GAS actions: appendTimeEntry, deleteTimeEntry, syncTimeLog, getTimeLog. Sheet: 00_Time_Log (row1=title, row2=headers, row3+=data).

                
✓
Mobile responsiveness — v5.48 (Mar 9, 2026)Comprehensive mobile CSS pass. iOS input auto-zoom fix (font-size 16px on all inputs). Tighter padding on setup card, modals, KPI cards, and settings sections. Table touch-scroll smoothing. topbar-user hidden on mobile. Small-phone (≤480px) rules: compact topbar, 2-col report cover grid. iPad/tablet (769–1024px) rules: pipeline charts 2-col, settings 1-col, two-col stacks. Zero HTML/JS changes — CSS only.

              

              
Completed Mar 9, 2026

            

          

        


        
        

          

            

            

              
v5.60 — Full System QA Audit (Mar 10, 2026)

              
39-item cross-file audit across GAS endpoint, dashboard, and spreadsheet. All Critical, High, and Medium issues resolved.

              

                
✓
1. BankRec schema realignment (6 fixes)writeBankRec, syncBankRecs, getBankRecs rewritten for 17-column 00_BankRec schema. Dashboard brSubmit, brSyncAll, brLoadFromSheet updated with accountId + booksDeposits/booksWithdrawals fields. Upsert match fixed: Month(D) + Account_ID(B). Row offsets corrected for title+header rows.

                
✓
2. Expense CRUD standardized on 00_Expense_Log (4 fixes)appendExpense retargeted from 06_Expense_Log (26 cols) to 00_Expense_Log (12 cols). Entry_ID written to col B for reliable delete. deleteExpense retargeted + row offset fixed. exAdd no longer removes entry from localStorage on GAS success — entry persists locally.

                
✓
3. Time Log entry persistence fixedtlAdd no longer removes entry from localStorage on GAS success. Eliminates vanishing-entry gap between local delete and next sheet refresh.

                
✓
4. Mileage/Expense/Time Log standardized lifecycleAll three subsystems now follow identical pattern: tab switch → init + auto-load from 00_* sheet if localStorage empty. Add → save local + await GAS append with feedback. Delete → remove local + GAS delete with failure feedback. milAdd upgraded from fire-and-forget to async/await.

                
✓
5. Delete buttons on all rows (consistency fix)Expenses and Time Log tabs now show delete (×) button on every row — sheet-sourced and local. Sheet rows removed from in-memory DATA array (session-only). Matches Mileage tab behavior.

                
✓
6. upsertConfig fixed for 4-column schemaKey lookup moved from col A to col B. Value write moved from col B to col C. Appends as 4 columns [Section, Key, Value, Notes]. loadMappingsFromSheet reads correct columns with legacy fallback.

                
✓
7. upsertAccount expanded to 10-column schemaNow writes all 10 columns matching 00_Accounts: Account_ID through Active. Currency, Include_In_Rec, Notes, Created_Date no longer overwritten with wrong data.

                
✓
8. appendInvoice GAS action implementedNew 19-column write to 05_Invoices. Formula columns left blank. Month columns auto-derived from dates. gasWriteInvoice() in dashboard now has a working endpoint.

                
✓
9. Contract Master #REF! formula repairedHours Remaining (col O) formula had #REF! references to deleted column. Corrected to reference col G (End Date).

                
✓
10. syncAllToSheet() completedNow calls all 4 subsystem syncs: milSyncAll + brSyncAll + exSyncAll + tlSyncAll.

                
✓
11. Mileage 13-column alignmentappendMileage and syncMileage now write LoggedAt (col M). getMileage returns deductibleMiles and loggedAt. All reads/writes match 13-column 00_Mileage schema.

                
✓
12. safeNum() numeric validation across all GAS functionsAll 53 parseFloat operations replaced with safeNum(val, fieldName) helper that logs console warnings on non-numeric input instead of silently returning 0.

                
✓
13. GAS token placeholder + security warningHardcoded example token replaced with PASTE-YOUR-TOKEN-HERE placeholder and deployment instructions.

                
✓
14. Delete feedback on all tabsAll three delete functions upgraded from fire-and-forget to async/await with warning message on GAS failure.

                
✓
15. Spreadsheet data fixes06_Expense_Log: Deductible flags corrected (N→Y for business expenses), missing Month values populated. 05_Invoices: placeholder text cleared from Deposit_Account_ID. 06_Expense_Log: description string in Account_ID cleaned.

              

              
Completed Mar 10, 2026

            

          

        


      


      

        
Accountable

        
Updated Mar 10, 2026 · v5.60 · Subject to revision

        📋
        Claude Notes
        Dev Only
      

      
Project operating rules, lessons learned, and context for new threads. Edit freely — saved to localStorage.


      

        

          
Quick Ref — File Workflow

          
    
            
  • Working copy: /home/claude/arquentix-v5_9.html
    • 
            
  • Output: /mnt/user-data/outputs/arquentix-dashboard-v5_XX.html
    • 
            
  • Always increment version in filename AND VERSION const
    • 
            
  • Call present_files() after every delivery
    • 
            
  • Update About tab roadmap every release
    • 
          

        

        

          
Quick Ref — Sheet Rules

          
    
            
  • NEVER recreate the spreadsheet
    • 
            
  • Always copy original → add to it → verify row counts
    • 
            
  • Append columns only — never insert mid-sheet
    • 
            
  • Current sheet: Arquentix_FOS_2026_v2.xlsx
    • 
            
  • New tabs: 00_Config, 00_Accounts, 00_BankRec + 5 stubs
    •

Sync Mileage to Sheet

    

      This will replace all data in the 00_Mileage tab with your
      0 local trips.
    

    

      ⚠ Existing sheet rows will be deleted and rewritten. This cannot be undone.

      Verify your local trip list is complete before proceeding.
    

    

      
      
    

  






  

    
Sync Bank Recs to Sheet

    

      This will replace all data in the 00_BankRec tab with your
      0 local reconciliation records.
    

    

      ⚠ Existing sheet rows will be deleted and rewritten. This cannot be undone.

      Use this for recovery only — normal saves write to the sheet automatically.
    

    

      
      
    

  







  

    
Sync Expenses to Sheet

    

      This will replace all data in the 00_Expense_Log tab with your
      0 local entries.
    

    

      ⚠ Existing sheet rows will be deleted and rewritten. This cannot be undone.

      Use this for recovery only — normal saves write to the sheet automatically.
    

    

      
      
    

  







  

    
Sync Time Log to Sheet

    

      This will replace all data in the 00_Time_Log tab with your
      0 local entries.
    

    

      ⚠ Existing sheet rows will be deleted and rewritten. This cannot be undone.

      Use this for recovery only — normal saves write to the sheet automatically.
